ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "account_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "account_closure_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was closed (if applicable) */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who applied for the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan */,
  "repayment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of loan repayment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was last updated */,
  "credit_score_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "officer_role" TEXT /* Role of the loan officer */,
  "officer_department" TEXT /* Department of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being applied for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer submitting the application */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkin_accounts" (
  "checkin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkin account entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the checking account */,
  "checkin_date" TEXT /* Date of the checkin */,
  "checkin_time" TEXT /* Time of the checkin */,
  "checkin_type" TEXT /* Type of checkin (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkin_accounts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duration" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan duration entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "duration_type" TEXT /* Type of duration (e.g., months, years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duration_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history status entry */,
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit history */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the credit history (e.g., good, fair, bad) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit history status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_status_credit_id FOREIGN KEY ("credit_id") REFERENCES credit_history ("credit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_status_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_payment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment plan entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Other payment plans of the customer */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of payment plan (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_payment_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Housing information of the customer */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., rent, own, mortgage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
